title: hedyosmum domingense subsp. cubense
intro: Hedyosmum domingense subsp. cubense, also known as Cuban alpine jasmine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Hedyosmum genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Hedyosmum domingense subsp. cubense can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
